testcase.name: test_eye_only_still_works_with_gradcam

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (False) + where False = isinstance(None, str) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ecbca3d8400>('gradcam_heatmap_base64') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ecbca3d8400> = {'attention_regions': [], 'confidence': 0.0, 'engine': 'gemini-fallback', 'image_type': 'eye', ...}.get

testcase.failure: test_anemia_backend.py:171: in test_eye_only_still_works_with_gradcam assert isinstance(eye.get("gradcam_heatmap_base64"), str) and len(eye["gradcam_heatmap_base64"]) > 100 E AssertionError: assert (False) E + where False = isinstance(None, str) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ecbca3d8400>('gradcam_heatmap_base64') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ecbca3d8400> = {'attention_regions': [], 'confidence': 0.0, 'engine': 'gemini-fallback', 'image_type': 'eye', ...}.get
